examples: The steam escaped with a loud hissing noise.
The iron teakettle was hissing splendidly over live coals.
Hissing at the base of the tree, Jack, the clawless cat, kept the bear at bay for about 15 minutes.
The males are known for their loud mating songs that sound like hissing chirps.
On one song, Lee used a can of bug spray to suggest a hissing cymbal sound.
